codeReview.summary: The commit is limited to README.md and config.example.yaml, adding OpenCode Go as a separate openai-compatibility example using the required Go base URL, placeholder OpenCode API key, chat-completions-only wording, and Go-specific routing distinct from Zen. No first-class OpenCode provider/runtime/auth/translator/registry/cmd/sdk changes were introduced.

summary: Pass. Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, config-docs-worker procedure, mission/shared-state files, and commit diff for 38173a15. The implementation satisfies VAL-OCGO-001 through VAL-OCGO-006: OpenCode Go remains docs/config-only via openai-compatibility, uses https://opencode.ai/zen/go/v1, uses placeholder-only credentials, documents only /chat/completions, distinguishes Go aliases/prefix from Zen, and touches only README.md plus config.example.yaml. No blocking or non-blocking code review issues and no shared-state gaps were found.
